items.title: Regulatory Surveillance Over Weight Loss Drug (GLP-1) Supply Chain
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Health and Family Welfare Regulatory Surveillance Over Weight Loss Drug (GLP-1) Supply Chain Posted On: 24 MAR 2026 10:02AM by PIB Delhi In order to ensure ethical pharmaceutical practices in the supply chain of Weight Loss Drug (GLP-1), the Drugs Controller of India has intensified its regulatory surveillance against the drug’s unauthorized sale and promotion. items.title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah extends Raising Day greetings to the courageous personnel of the Assam Rifles and their families
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Home Affairs Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah extends Raising Day greetings to the courageous personnel of the Assam Rifles and their families They shield our borders in the Northeast’s challenging terrains, embodying their valor and patriotism Assam Rifles Jawans foster trust among communities through their humanitarian support Remember…

items.title: Indian Railways Approves Kosamba Rail Over Rail Flyover in Gujarat and Bhagalpur Bypass in Bihar to Strengthen Rail Connectivity and Capacity
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Railways Indian Railways Approves Kosamba Rail Over Rail Flyover in Gujarat and Bhagalpur Bypass in Bihar to Strengthen Rail Connectivity and Capacity Projects Worth ₹647.58 Crore to Ensure Uninterrupted and Safe Movement of Trains on Critical Routes Posted On: 24 MAR 2026 11:38AM by PIB Delhi The Ministry of Railways has approved two important rail infrastructure pr…
